title: Claude + HeyGen Just Changed Content Creation Forever

extracted.hook: Today, I'm going to show you how I was able to automate hours of recording content using Cloud Code and HeyGen.

slows: during detailed explanations of each tool

extracted.vulnerability: "I have generated over 100, maybe even 200 of these clips, and I've tweaked things"
extracted.cta: If you guys enjoyed the video or you learned something new, please give it a like, it helps me out a ton. And as always, I appreciate you guys making it to the end of the video, and I'll see you in the next one.
transitions: So, let's talk about some of the other stuff.
Um this document will be attached for completely free in my free school community.
And then we do have a different cost for the HeyGen API.
analogies: "because it's not just lip syncing, it's actually learning how you gesture and how you move, and it feels way more like you"

"And then for Cloud Code, you know, 20 to 200 bucks a month, which orchestrates the entire pipeline. You can also do this in something like Co-work, and maybe even Claude if you put the right connectors in."
frameworks: "The first one is that the avatar has crossed the uncanny valley"
"The next one is that AI can orchestrate the entire production pipeline"
